overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a worn industrial space station interior. The character walks through a commercial waiting area with seating and posters into deeper industrial corridors featuring large cylindrical machinery and metal walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial waiting area with seating and wall posters

events.description: character begins walking forward from a stationary position
pedestrian in green shirt walks past closely on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through a commercial waiting area with orange chairs and colorful wall posters

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera from right to left wearing a green shirt and red hair
standing near the wall by the orange chairs wearing a long coat

entered.detail: row of three orange chairs against the left wall
colorful advertisements and green graffiti decals on the wall
large vertical industrial cylinder with pipes visible in the distance
thick black hoses and pipes running along the floor

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through a commercial waiting area featuring orange chairs against the left wall and colorful posters. A pedestrian in a green shirt passes by on the right, while another NPC stands near the seating area. The floor is tiled with large industrial pipes running along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with large cylindrical machinery

events.description: moving from the commercial waiting area into the industrial machinery corridor

agents.ego_description: walking past a large cylindrical industrial tank with yellow-black warning stripes at its base

entered.detail: elevated metal walkway with railings visible on the left side
yellow and black hazard stripes on the floor near the cylinder base

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the commercial area into a narrower industrial corridor dominated by a large cylindrical tank on the right with warning stripes at its base. An elevated metal catwalk becomes visible on the left. The space is now empty of other people, focusing on industrial machinery and piping.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial bay with distant crane and cargo

events.description: entering a larger open industrial bay with visible crane structures ahead

agents.ego_description: proceeding into an open industrial bay with scattered equipment and distant machinery

entered.detail: large industrial crane structure visible in the distant bay
stacked cargo containers and equipment in the open area ahead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide-open industrial bay with a large crane structure visible on the left and cargo containers scattered in the distance. The cylindrical tank is now behind, and the metal catwalk runs closer on the left side. The environment opens up significantly with higher ceilings and more distant machinery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a populated commercial waiting area into a vast, desolate industrial bay. It begins by following a character past orange seating and colorful posters, moving through a tiled space where pedestrians pass by alongside large industrial pipes. As the character advances, the environment shifts into a narrower corridor dominated by a large cylindrical tank with warning stripes and an elevated metal catwalk. The scene then opens up significantly as the character leaves the machinery behind and enters a wide-open bay featuring a large crane structure and scattered cargo containers under high ceilings.
